items.html: We shall now explain the matter of one door and one hinge, and from it the second will be understood. It is known that at the time of Zivug [coupling], the man inseminates a drop of white into the Yesod of the female, and she receives it there; and she, too, inseminates a drop of red, which is MAN [Mayin Nukvin]; and it all remains there in her womb, and there that drop takes its form over the duration of the Ibur [gestation]. Afterwards the doors open, and the newborn is born and comes outside.
